statement: Bootstrap-of-truth anchoring live from epoch 28102 (2026-06-10T18:50:30Z): hourly braid of OTS->Bitcoin (hash-based, quantum-durable), RFC3161 TSA token, drand pulse round 6189546; daily proof upgrade + Bitcoin header self-archival from two sources; proofs replicated off-site. Truth bootstraps by leaning on older truth; Bitcoin is the ladder, not the building.
decided_by: Nenad (demand: concrete evidence from the beginning; objection: BTC not PQ), Elara (design + ship)
